name: School Blazer
description: Smart school blazer available in navy, black, and grey. Durable fabric built for everyday wear.

name: Track Suit
description: Comfortable and durable track suit, perfect for school sports and PE classes.

name: School Shirt
description: Crisp white and light blue school shirts. Easy-iron fabric, long and short sleeve available.

name: School Trousers
description: Neat school trousers and shorts available. Sizes for all ages from primary to secondary.

name: School Dress
description: Neat school dresses in checked and plain patterns. Comfortable fit for girls.

name: Ladies Fashion Dress
description: Elegant fashion dresses for all occasions. Stylish designs in vibrant colours.

name: Trouser Outfit
description: Matching trouser outfits for a polished and professional look. Multiple styles available.

name: Worksuit
description: Sharp worksuits for the professional woman. Tailored fit with quality finishing.

name: Anorak Jacket
description: Stylish and warm anorak jackets. Perfect for cool weather and outdoor activities.

name: Laptop Bag
description: Sleek and protective laptop bags. Fits up to 15.6 inch laptops with extra compartments.

name: Sports Bag
description: Roomy sports bag with ventilated compartments. Great for gym, school and travel.

name: Satchel Bag
description: Classic satchel bags in leather and faux-leather. Ideal for school and work.

name: Biker Jacket
description: Bold and edgy biker jackets in premium faux leather. A true fashion statement.

name: School Hat
description: School-approved hats in various colours. Sun protection and smart appearance.

name: Lunch Bag
description: Insulated lunch bags keeping food fresh. Fun designs for kids, smart ones for adults.
